data.title: Mare Group S.p.A. Achieves 2024 Guidance with Strong Growth and Strategic Expansion
data.description:
The latest update is out from Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ).

Mare Group S.p.A. reported strong preliminary results for 2024, achieving its guidance with a 13.1% increase in production value and a 24.5% rise in EBITDA. The company has zeroed its net financial position, reflecting improved business operations and strategic growth through acquisitions. With the completion of proprietary technology platforms and a focus on expansion, Mare Group aims to exceed €100 million in revenue, solidifying its leadership in the engineering sector and enhancing its market positioning.

More about Mare Engineering Group SpA

Mare Group S.p.A. is a digital engineering company listed on Euronext Growth Milan, operating in Italy and internationally. The company focuses on innovation through enabling technologies, with a strong presence in the Aerospace & Defence and Railway sectors, offering applied engineering and digital services.

YTD Price Performance: -9.82%

Average Trading Volume: 15,772

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

data.title: Silver Grant International Approves Key Loan Assignment Agreement
data.description:
The latest update is out from Silver Grant International Holdings Group ( (HK:0171) ).

Silver Grant International Holdings Group Limited announced that the resolution proposed at their Extraordinary General Meeting on February 28, 2025, was passed unanimously. This resolution involved the approval and ratification of a Loan Assignment Agreement, which is expected to impact the company’s operations positively by facilitating necessary transactions.

Silver Grant International Holdings Group Limited is a company incorporated in Hong Kong with limited liability, focusing on substantial acquisitions and disposals.

data.title: Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Director’s Shareholding Update
data.description:
Bendigo & Adelaide Bank Ltd. ( (AU:BEN) ) has shared an update.

Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Limited announced a change in the interests of its director, Richard David Deutsch, as per the requirements of the ASX listing rules. The director’s direct holding in BEN ordinary shares increased by 1,219 shares due to the vesting of rights under the BEN Omnibus Equity Plan, while the rights to shares decreased by the same amount. This change reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to aligning director interests with shareholder value, potentially impacting the company’s governance and stakeholder relations.

More about Bendigo & Adelaide Bank Ltd.

Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Limited operates in the financial services industry, primarily offering banking products and services. The company focuses on providing retail banking, business banking, and wealth management services to its customers, with a strong presence in the Australian market.

YTD Price Performance: 6.53%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

data.title: Credit Intelligence Limited Reports Improved Financial Health Amid Revenue Decline
data.description:
Credit Intelligence Ltd ( (AU:CI1) ) has issued an announcement.

Credit Intelligence Limited reported a 13% decline in revenue for the half-year ending December 2024 compared to the previous year. Despite this, the company saw a significant reduction in net loss by 64%, indicating improved operational efficiency. The company did not declare any dividends for the period and discontinued the operation of Chapter Two Holdings Pty Ltd. These financial results suggest a strategic shift in operations, potentially impacting stakeholders by focusing on core business areas and improving financial health.

More about Credit Intelligence Ltd

Credit Intelligence Limited operates in the financial services industry, focusing on debt restructuring and credit management solutions. The company provides services aimed at assisting individuals and businesses in managing and resolving debt-related issues.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$9.68M

data.title: Arcadium Lithium PLC to Exit S&P/ASX 200 Index Post Rio Tinto Acquisition
data.description:
Arcadium Lithium Plc Chess Depositary Interests Repr 1 Sh ( (AU:LTM) ) has issued an update.

Arcadium Lithium PLC, a company involved in the lithium industry, is set to be removed from the S&P/ASX 200 Index following its acquisition by Rio Tinto Limited. This removal will take effect prior to the opening of trading on March 6, 2025, and Arcadium will be replaced by Mesoblast Limited in the index. This change reflects a significant shift in Arcadium’s market positioning and could have implications for stakeholders as it transitions under the ownership of a major industry player like Rio Tinto.

More about Arcadium Lithium Plc Chess Depositary Interests Repr 1 Sh

data.title: NRW Holdings Faces Financial Challenges Amid OneSteel Administration
data.description:
NRW Holdings Limited ( (AU:NWH) ) has issued an announcement.

NRW Holdings Limited announced that its subsidiary, Golding, has been affected by the administration of OneSteel Manufacturing Pty Ltd, to which it provides mining services. Despite being owed $113.3 million, NRW has not recognized any earnings impact and continues operations under the direction of administrators. The company holds security that it believes is sufficient to recover outstanding amounts and is considering its options to protect shareholder interests.

More about NRW Holdings Limited

NRW Holdings Limited operates in the civil and mining services industry, providing a range of services through its subsidiary, Golding. The company focuses on delivering mining services and has been involved in projects such as the South West Gateway Alliance.

data.description:

Pharma Mar, S.A. has released its annual report on the remuneration of its directors, detailing the compensation accrued in 2024 and planned for 2025. The report outlines the company’s remuneration policy, which aims to align with long-term interests and manage risks, while also considering shareholder feedback. The company has also introduced changes to its remuneration policy for 2025-2028 to ensure competitiveness and sustainability.

Pharma Mar, S.A. operates in the pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of marine-derived drugs. The company is known for its innovative approach in oncology and other therapeutic areas, leveraging its expertise in marine biotechnology.

data.title: Prosperity Group Reports Interim Results with Reduced Losses
data.description:
Kingbo Strike Ltd. ( (HK:1421) ) just unveiled an update.

Prosperity Group International Limited reported its unaudited interim results for the six months ended December 31, 2024, revealing a decrease in revenue to HK$54,654,000 from HK$63,118,000 in the same period of 2023. The company experienced a loss for the period of HK$13,920,000, which is an improvement from the previous year’s loss of HK$23,989,000, indicating a challenging yet slightly improved financial performance.

More about Kingbo Strike Ltd.

Prosperity Group International Limited, formerly known as Kingbo Strike Limited, is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and operates in the financial sector. The company is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and engages in various business activities through its subsidiaries.

data.title: Bakkavor Director Jane Lodge Appointed to Morgan Advanced Materials Board
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Bakkavor Group plc ( (GB:BAKK) ).

Bakkavor Group plc announced that Jane Lodge, an Independent Non-executive Director and Chair of the Company’s Audit & Risk Committee, has been appointed as an Independent Non-executive Director of Morgan Advanced Materials plc, effective from 1 June 2025. This appointment reflects Bakkavor’s commitment to strong governance and may enhance its strategic oversight, potentially impacting its market positioning positively.

More about Bakkavor Group plc

Bakkavor Group plc is a leading provider of fresh prepared food in the UK, with a significant presence in the US and China. The company specializes in offering a diverse range of innovative food products, including meals, pizza & bread, salads, and desserts, catering to leading grocery retailers in the UK and US, as well as international food brands in China.
